Home.heroSubtitle: Book your table or order for pickup. Fresh ingredients and chef-driven recipes.
Home.phaseNote: Checkout is live. Next: real-time admin dashboard.
Home.promoSubtitle: Place your order quickly and enjoy at home in minutes.
Home.reviewsSubtitle: The satisfaction of those who have already tried our dishes.
Home.reviewsMore: See the reviews of more than 50 customers who have already tried our food
Home.review1Text: Very good place. It's takeout but has a small table that worked for us to eat there. Pros: we could bring our dog with no issues. Hugo is a delight, you'll feel at home and he puts a lot of love into what he does... Thanks Hugo, best of luck and see you soon!
Home.review2Text: Definitely will repeat!! great flavor, large portions and a gastronomic experience at a good price. 100% recommended.
Home.review3Text: Excellent flavor and portions like those in Venezuela, typical tasty rice where nothing is withheld!! Very generous and tasty, we are always buying, I recommend it with closed eyes.
Home.review4Text: Excellent Chinese rice, it's like having a bit of our land on the palate, I would repeat without a doubt, quality and quantity as it should be, no comparison.
Home.review5Text: I just ordered for takeout... I am Chinese-Venezuelan and the Chinese rice, ribs and lumpia... super good and tasty 100% recommended.

Shell.footerTagline: The perfect fusion between Chinese tradition and the Latino heart. Flavor that unites continents in every dish.
Shell.footerDeliverySub: Prefer us to bring it to you? Find us on Glovo.

MenuPage.title: Menu
MenuPage.intro: Wok-style dishes. Add to your cart and review the total before checkout.

CartPage.title: Cart
CartPage.intro: Adjust quantities and check the total. You'll confirm at checkout (cash in store).
CartPage.hint: Prices are locked when you add items; the final amount is confirmed at pickup.

Checkout.title: Checkout
Checkout.intro: Pickup in store, cash on collection. Confirm your details; totals are recomputed on the server.
Checkout.paymentNote: You will pay in cash when you pick up your order.

errors.err_lines_min: Add at least one dish to your cart.
errors.err_lines_max: Too many lines in this order.

server.UNKNOWN_DISH: A dish is no longer on the menu or is out of stock. Return to the cart and refresh.

CheckoutSuccess.title: Thank you!

CheckoutSuccess.invalidBody: The order id is missing or invalid.

About.title: Our History
About.subtitle: De Aquí y De Allá: A fusion of cultures and flavors
About.bioPara1: Hugo Salgar Camacho is the soul and creative force behind De Aquí y De Allá. With a unique vision that joins the thousand-year tradition of Chinese cuisine with Latino warmth and seasoning, Hugo has created a gastronomic concept that transcends borders in the heart of Granada.
About.bioPara2: His passion for martial arts and discipline is reflected in every dish that leaves his kitchen: precision in the cut, mastery of the fire in the wok, and an absolute respect for fresh products.
About.bioPara3: For Hugo, cooking is not just feeding, it's telling a story. The story of a journey that started "allá" (there) and that today we share with all of you "aquí" (here). Welcome to his home.
About.wokDesc: The "Wok Hei": the breath of the fire in every grain of rice.
About.ingredientsDesc: Granada produce with authentic Oriental techniques.
About.passionDesc: Generous portions because we care about your happiness.
